name: Time-Lapse Kymograph Generation
description: You are a biophysicist studying cell division kinetics. Your goal is to generate a kymograph (space-time plot) from the 'Mitosis' 5D hyperstack sample to visualize chromosome movement over time. Process the Red channel (chromosomes) by performing a Max Intensity Z-projection across all time frames. Save this intermediate time-lapse stack to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/mitosis_projection.tif. From this projection, generate a kymograph by reslicing along a line drawn through the center of the dividing cell, crossing both sets of chromosomes along the axis of division. Save the final kymograph image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/mitosis_kymograph.tif. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
